tools.name: add-tracking-to-order
tools.description: Alias of set-order-tracking. Kept for compatibility.

tools.name: analyze-reference-ui
tools.description: Fetch and analyze an external reference URL as compact DOM guidance for Shopify section generation. The tool strips heavy tags, preserves structural IDs/classes and inline SVG markup, returns token-efficient Pug-like markup, adds a structured referenceSpec, and returns an actionable sectionPlan so LLMs can go directly into draft-theme-artifact. Image inputs are treated as hints only unless a future multimodal stage exists.

tools.name: apply-theme-draft
tools.description: Apply a previously drafted theme artifact to an explicit target theme. This is the promote/apply step after draft-theme-artifact has prepared and verified the files.

tools.name: clone-product-from-url
tools.description: Clone a public Shopify product URL into your connected store with options, variants, prices and media.

tools.name: create-product
tools.description: Create a new product. When using productOptions, Shopify registers all option values but only creates one default variant (first value of each option, price $0). Use manage-product-variants with strategy=REMOVE_STANDALONE_VARIANT afterward to create all real variants with prices.

tools.name: delete-product
tools.description: Delete a product

tools.name: delete-product-variants
tools.description: Delete one or more variants from a product

tools.name: delete-theme-file
tools.description: Delete a file from a Shopify theme (defaults to live theme role=main).

tools.name: draft-theme-artifact
tools.description:
Draft and validate Shopify theme files through the guarded preview pipeline. This is the only supported remote create/update path for theme artifacts: files are inspected, linted, stored in theme_drafts, pushed to a preview-safe target by default, and verified after write before they are ready for merchant review.

⚠️ EXTREMELY CRITICAL STRICT CODE GENERATION RULES ⚠️
Rule 1 (UI/UX): Code MUST represent modern, premium Shopify 2.0 UI. NEVER use visible native scrollbars (::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }). Use modern CSS (scroll-snap-type, display: grid, gap, aspect-ratio).
Rule 2 (Dynamic Schema): NEVER hardcode texts, colors, or image URLs in the HTML. EVERY visual element MUST be bound to a setting in the {% schema %} (using color_picker, image_picker, text, richtext, range for spacing/layout controls).
Rule 3 (Blocks): Sliders, grids, and galleries MUST use the blocks architecture so merchants can add/remove/reorder content in the editor.
Rule 4 (Presets): Every section MUST have a complete presets array with default blocks so it appears in the Theme Editor.
Rule 5 (Shopify Constraints): Do not place Liquid inside {% stylesheet %} or {% javascript %}; use <style> or markup-level CSS variables when section.id scoping is required.

tools.name: get-customer-orders
tools.description: Get orders for a specific customer

tools.name: get-customers
tools.description: Get customers or search by name/email

tools.name: get-license-status
tools.description: Return current license status, effective access, and MCP scope capabilities.

tools.name: get-order-by-id
tools.description: READ-ONLY: fetch a specific order and tracking status. Does not update anything.

tools.name: get-orders
tools.description: READ-ONLY: get orders with optional filtering by status. Supports cursor pagination.

tools.name: get-product-by-id
tools.description: Get a specific product by ID

tools.name: get-products
tools.description: Get all products or search by title

tools.name: get-supported-tracking-companies
tools.description: Get Shopify-supported tracking carriers that can be selected in the order fulfillment tracking UI

tools.name: get-theme-file
tools.description: Read a file from a Shopify theme (defaults to live theme role=main).

tools.name: get-theme-files
tools.description: Read multiple files from a Shopify theme with metadata-first default output.

tools.name: get-themes
tools.description: List available Shopify themes (including the live theme).

tools.name: list_theme_import_tools
tools.description: List metadata/advice for external tools used outside this remote MCP for visual review workflows. Do not use this for the normal remote draft/apply flow.

tools.name: manage-product-options
tools.description: Create, update, or delete product options (e.g. Size, Color). Use action='create' to add options, 'update' to rename or add/remove values, 'delete' to remove options.

tools.name: manage-product-variants
tools.description: Create or update product variants. Omit variant id to create new, include id to update existing.

tools.name: refund-order
tools.description: Create a full or partial refund for an order using Shopify refundCreate.

tools.name: search-theme-files
tools.description: Search scoped theme files and return compact snippets instead of full file dumps. Prefer this before full reads when fixing styling/code or borrowing a small reference pattern.

tools.name: set-order-tracking
tools.description: One-shot tracking update tool for LLMs: resolves order reference, updates fulfillment tracking, and returns verification-ready output.

tools.name: update-customer
tools.description: Update a customer's information

tools.name: update-fulfillment-tracking
tools.description: Update order shipment tracking in the actual fulfillment record (not custom attributes/metafields). fulfillmentId is optional; when omitted, the latest non-cancelled fulfillment is updated automatically.

tools.name: update-order
tools.description: Update an existing order with new information

tools.name: update-order-tracking
tools.description: Alias of set-order-tracking. Kept for compatibility.

tools.name: update-product
tools.description: Update an existing product's fields (title, description, status, tags, etc.)

tools.name: verify-theme-files
tools.description: Verify multiple theme files by expected metadata (size/checksumMd5).
